message:
feat(scripting): extension lifecycle management (wa-3dfxb.10)

Adds ExtensionLifecycle that wraps ExtensionManager with state tracking,
event bus integration, keybinding registration, and per-extension storage.
Extensions transition through Installed→Loaded→Disabled→Error states with
.state.toml persistence for surviving restarts. 12 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
